finding: Treats gradient-institution as canonical/ratified active repository and proposes 00_INSTITUTIONAL_CONTROL…99_TEMP parallel institutional hierarchy inside Crisis Liturgies.
required_change: Rewrite topology as program-local lifecycle paths; repository language = CANDIDATE only; reject second institutional hierarchy.
replacement_rule: CL is a program within The Gradient; operational control under CRISIS_LITURGIES/00_PROJECT_CONTROL; institution-level records stay in TG institutional lanes by reference.

finding: Tree encodes rejected parallel institutional namespace.
required_change: Replace with revised program topology register; mark all new parents NOT MATERIALIZED.

finding: Single MIG-001 batch mixes governance copies with builder schemas; destinations under rejected 00_INSTITUTIONAL_CONTROL and 06_BUILDER; root described as ratified.
required_change: Split into CL-MIG-001A and CL-MIG-001B with program-local destinations; candidate language; no eligibility while authority unresolved.

finding: Compound destinations using '+' / 'or' / OUT_OF_NAMESPACE prose; not one exact destination per row.
required_change: One source → one exact absolute destination per mapping row; no wildcards or inferred paths.

finding: Default RB-A DELETE_WRITTEN_TARGETS_ONLY makes deletion part of rollback.
required_change: Replace with non-destructive evidence-driven rollback; deletion requires separate destruction authorization.

finding: Missing first-class occupancy, collision, authority evidence, parent validation, copy receipt, post-copy hash, verification fields.
required_change: Issue revised migration manifest schema with required Phase 02C fields.
replacement_rule: CL_PHASE_02C_MIGRATION_MANIFEST_SCHEMA.json supersedes Phase 02 schema for future batches.

finding: Incomplete stable identity / access / retention / replacement policy surface for external evidence.
required_change: Issue revised external binary reference schema with Phase 02C required fields.

finding: 21 Phase 02B dry-run-eligible rows targeted rejected 00_INSTITUTIONAL_CONTROL / 06_BUILDER paths; destination parents absent.
required_change: Remap to program-local 00_PROJECT_CONTROL children; keep mapping_status blocked until ratification and materialization authority.
replacement_rule: Exact destinations under 01_PROGRAM_GOVERNANCE, 03_PHASE_EVIDENCE, 05_BUILDER_CONTRACTS; materialization_authorized=NO in this phase.

finding: CLASSIFY_THEN_COPY unresolved; files cannot be migration-eligible.
required_change: Require classification rule ratification before any admit/quarantine/handoff mapping.

finding: Five registry/decision records have no source files; blocked.
required_change: Human must author records under program-local registry lane after RAT-CL-007; no migration eligibility beforehand.
replacement_rule: BLOCKED_AUTHORITY until authored artifacts exist with hashes and authority evidence.

finding: Large inventory payloads incorrectly considered for copy in early planning; must remain external references.
required_change: EXCLUDED from MIG-001A/B; create external reference records only after schema ratification.
human_ratification_required: NO for exclusion; YES for later reference authoring

finding: Phase 02 would have duplicated institutional control inside CL.
required_change: Reference TG institutional lanes; do not copy Gradient constitution into CL.
replacement_rule: Pointers only under 00_PROJECT_CONTROL/04_EXTERNAL_REFERENCES/ after separate authorization.
